member.name: T:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.Hosting.WebbApplicationBuilderDecorator
member.summary: Configures the of the specified using the provided configuration action.
member.remarks: This method allows additional configuration of the host builder within the web application builder, enabling customization of the hosting environment.

member.summary: Configures the host builder for the specified .
member.remarks: This method allows additional configuration of the host builder used by the web application. The provided action is invoked with the associated with the .

member.remarks: This method allows for chaining configuration actions on a instance.
